productDisplayName: Lee Men's Ten Minutes to Midnight T-shirt
description: Here is another cowboy themed lee t-shirt from the lee Storm Rider collection. This lee t-shirt is designed with a special high strength yarn, which gives it a subtle sheen and perfect drape. Made with anti-crease modal-cotton blend fabric, this Storm rider t-shirt is ideal for long road trips and travels.    Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2.
